rulings.Case Title: WALTER YEE et al VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 12, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to allege facts to state a cause of action for City's taking of Plaintiff's property that is not barred by, inter alia, statute of limitations, Government Claims Action, exhaustion of administrative remedies and statute of frauds. Plaintiff was given multiple opportunities and had sufficient time (action was filed in April 2013) to address these issues. See rulings on Demurrers to Complaint and Amended Complaints, hearings held on September 9, 2016, January 26, 2017 and July 13, 2017. The Court notes again that Plaintiff's opposition is again devoid of any legal authority.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. FU HUANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 12, 2018 line 4. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. INA JOAN KIM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Against Ina Kim
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 12, 2018 line 5. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Against Ina Kim DENIED in part and GRANTED in part, subject to opposition. Motion is DENIED as to the first issue (defenses 3H) as Plaintiff failed to shift its burden. No evidence is provided in support of Plaintiff's argument. While the Points and Authorities reference Declaration of Dan Stone, such declaration is devoid of any mention of rent payments. Motion is GRANTED as to defense 3J(1), subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. INA JOAN KIM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Ina Kim'S Responses To Pltf'S Form Interrogatories (General) And Req. For Sanctions Against Ina Kim In The Amount Of $1555.00
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 12, 2018 line 5. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY's Amended Motion To Compel Ina Kim'S Responses To Pltf'S Form Interrogatories (General) And Req. For Sanctions Against Ina Kim In The Amount Of $1555.00 GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $710. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN YUDOWITZ VS. MART BAILEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reconsider And To Revoke The Order Reclassifying Action And Granting Plaintiff'S Leave To File Amended Complaint And Convert Action, Or Alternatively, To Also Convert Cud-17-660510 To A General Civil Action And Consolidate With The Present Action (Ccp 1008 (A))
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 12, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT MART BAILEY's Motion To Reconsider And To Revoke The Order Reclassifying Action And Granting Plaintiff'S Leave To File Amended Complaint And Convert Action, Or Alternatively, To Also Convert Cud-17-660510 To A General Civil Action And Consolidate With The Present Action (Ccp 1008 (A)) Hearing Required. By no later than 9:00 a.m. Plaintiff shall submit a declaration (Plaintiff or counsel) explicitly stating (1) if Plaintiff is seeking to recover $3,770 in late fees in action 660112 and (2) if Plaintiff is seeking to recover $3,770 in late fees in action 660510. = (501/REQ)
